category_sources: Official Dalfox site describes it as a powerful open-source XSS scanner and automation utility.
source_facts.description says Dalfox is an XSS scanner and utility focused on automation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dalfox; official site branding uses Dalfox/DALFOX.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official Dalfox documentation site with Getting Started, Guide, and Reference sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/hahwul/dalfox, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Dalfox site describes reflected, stored, and DOM-based XSS discovery, multiple scan modes, REST API, MCP, and CI-friendly outputs.
source_facts.description says it is an XSS scanner focused on automation.
